sql_array: CREATE TABLE xml_schemas (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, schema_name VARCHAR(255), schema_definition TEXT);
INSERT INTO xml_schemas (schema_name, schema_definition) VALUES ('persons', '<xs:schema xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"><xs:element name="person"/></xs:schema>');
UPDATE xml_schemas SET schema_definition = '<xs:schema xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"><xs:element name="individual"/></xs:schema>' WHERE schema_name = 'persons';
